entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop (Pennisetum glaucum L.) targeted for micronutrient improvement

entities.name: IRON DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A state of insufficient iron in the body or plant

entities.name: ZINC DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A state of insufficient zinc in the body or plant

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where high rates of iron and zinc deficiency are observed

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions facing serious public health problems due to micronutrient malnutrition

entities.name: HUMAN
entities.description: The species affected by iron and zinc deficiencies, specifically pregnant women and children

entities.name: IRON DENSITY
entities.description: The concentration of iron in the grain of the crop

entities.name: ZINC DENSITY
entities.description: The concentration of zinc in the grain of the crop

entities.name: WHOLE GENOME RNA-SEQ
entities.description: A transcriptome approach used to identify genes and pathways related to nutrient accumulation

entities.name: ICMB 1505
entities.description: A high iron and zinc grain density pearl millet inbred line

entities.name: IRON STRESS
entities.description: Experimental treatment involving the absence or limitation of iron

entities.name: ZINC STRESS
entities.description: Experimental treatment involving the absence or limitation of zinc

entities.name: HYDROPONICS
entities.description: A method of growing plants in a nutrient solution without soil

entities.name: INTERVEINAL CHLOROSIS
entities.description: Yellowing of leaf tissue between veins, a symptom of nutrient deficiency

entities.name: RNA EXTRACTION
entities.description: The process of isolating total RNA from tissue samples

entities.name: CDNA SYNTHESIS
entities.description: The process of synthesizing complementary DNA from an RNA template

entities.name: ILLUMINA HISEQ 2500
entities.description: A high-throughput sequencing platform used for cDNA libraries

entities.name: DIFFERENTIALLY EXPRESSED GENES
entities.description: Genes that show statistically significant differences in expression between different conditions

entities.name: FE AND ZN HOMEOSTASIS
entities.description: The process by which biological systems maintain internal iron and zinc balance

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMMES
entities.description: Systematic efforts to improve crop traits through selection and crossing
